title: QosmicCompetitorAnalysis
description: Competitor analysis as structured data (D18). LLM + web-search grounded. If web search is unavailable, status=unavailable and we say so honestly — never fabricated.

status.description: 'ok' if web-search-grounded; 'unavailable' if no web search/config — honest, no fabrication.

note.description: When status=unavailable, the honest reason shown in the report.

intro.description: One-line framing of how competitors make the job easier vs. this store's edge.

domain.description: Real domain; verified to resolve by synth.verify_domains.

store_edge.description: Our store's edge — should reference our own digest evidence.

domain_resolves.description: Set by the deterministic domain-verify guard.
